description: DescribeTagsRequest schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

filters.description: You can filter the list using a key-value format. You can separate these items by using logical operators.

name.description: A name of the tag filter.

maxResults.description: The total number of items to return in a single page of output.

nextToken.description: A token to start the list. Use this token to get the next set of results.
